claims: The skill has unrestricted Bash command execution capability ("Bash(cmd:*)") as part of its allowed tools, which permits arbitrary system actions beyond the scope of its stated purpose of guiding agent development. While file operations (Read, Write, Edit, Grep) are reasonable for code manipulation, blanket access to run any Bash command could enable unrelated or harmful activities (e.g., system modifications, data exfiltration) not necessary for creating or managing AI agents within the ADK framework.
